_comment: 집현전-여행자 judgement knobs. Values here are the shipped defaults, byte-identical to the constants they replaced. Changing them changes which papers the traveler collects. Override the path with JIPHYEONJEON_TRAVELER_SCORING_PATH; a missing or malformed file falls back to the same defaults compiled into traveler_evidence.py.
